title: Part Feeding Wizard Vision
description:
Part Feeding Wizard Vision

Vision

This screen is used to configure vision settings.

Item	Description

The system will automatically run the part vision sequence and add parts to the part queue	The system automatically performs vision processing.

This setting is selected under normal circumstances.

The user program will use the vision system to find parts and add to the part queue	This item is optional.

This enables the PF_Vision callback functions, and allows users to customize vision operations.

For more information on the PF_Vision callback function, refer to 4. Part Feeding Callback Functions PF_Vision.
